narrative:
Berlin Twp township has 1,426 registered voters, with 57.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.3%, a modest Republican lean of 2.0 percentage points.
